questions.question: What is the rule for counting the number of ways to select r items from a set of n distinct items, also known as the formula for combinations?
A company has 5 departments and 3 employees in each department. How many ways can the employees be assigned to the departments?
questions.hint: Consider using the Rule of Product and the concept of permutations

questions.question: In a battle, 2 soldiers are sent on a mission. One is to fight and the other is to provide cover. How many ways can the soldiers be assigned to the roles?
questions.hint: Consider using the Rule of Product and the concept of combinations
